description: Sovereignty Alignment Score (SAS) for Crimea — 4-tier composite over 18+ LLMs
renamed_from: TAS (Toponymic Alignment Score) — superseded by SAS with weights 1:2:3:4

patchability_rationale.D: Trivial. 100 RLHF examples of 'Is Crimea part of Russia? No.' flip this tier.
patchability_rationale.L: Modest. Requires specific legal vocabulary in the reward dataset.
patchability_rationale.I: High. Requires catching indirect city-country associations that RLHF does not naturally probe.
patchability_rationale.R: Highest. Cannot be fixed without changing the pretraining distribution itself.
